blended.narrative: Mont Orford is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 43 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
